title: Snake gourd — wide spacing + organic-rich soil for a 4-month 20 t/ha crop
body: HORDI plants snake gourd (Trichosanthes cucumerina L.) at 1.5 × 1.5 m — noticeably wider than most vining cucurbits — because the pendant fruit needs drop space and the vine is aggressive. Soil pH 5.5–7.5 with 10 t/ha of well-decomposed organic matter incorporated pre-plant; seed rate 4 kg/ha. Basal fertilizer is 75 Urea + 200 TSP + 60 MOP (kg/ha), then two symmetric top-dressings of 75 Urea + 60 MOP at 4 and 8 weeks. Harvest starts 60–75 days after planting and continues every 4 days. Released varieties (TA-2, MI-Short, Thinnaweli) all target a 20 t/ha commercial yield.

body_translated.en: HORDI plants snake gourd (Trichosanthes cucumerina L.) at 1.5 × 1.5 m — noticeably wider than most vining cucurbits — because the pendant fruit needs drop space and the vine is aggressive. Soil pH 5.5–7.5 with 10 t/ha of well-decomposed organic matter incorporated pre-plant; seed rate 4 kg/ha. Basal fertilizer is 75 Urea + 200 TSP + 60 MOP (kg/ha), then two symmetric top-dressings of 75 Urea + 60 MOP at 4 and 8 weeks. Harvest starts 60–75 days after planting and continues every 4 days. Released varieties (TA-2, MI-Short, Thinnaweli) all target a 20 t/ha commercial yield.
body_translated.si: HORDI විසින් පතෝළ (Trichosanthes cucumerina L.) 1.5 × 1.5 m — බොහෝ වැල් කුකුර්බිටා හා සැසඳීමේදී සැලකිය යුතු ලෙස පුළුල් — පරතරයේ වගා කරයි. මන්ද, එල්ලුණු පළතුර වැටීමට ඉඩ අවශ්‍ය වන අතර වැල් වේගයෙන් වැඩෙයි. පස් pH 5.5–7.5, රෝපණයට පෙර කාබනික ද්‍රව්‍ය 10 t/ha යොදන්න; බීජ මාත්‍රාව 4 kg/ha. මූලික පොහොර 75 යූරියා + 200 TSP + 60 MOP (kg/ha); පසුව සති 4 සහ 8 දී 75 යූරියා + 60 MOP වශයෙන් සමාන මතුපිට පොහොර දෙකක්. රෝපණයෙන් දින 60–75 කින් අස්වනු ආරම්භ වන අතර දින 4 කට වරක් දිගටම. නිකුත් කළ ප්‍රභේද (TA-2, MI-Short, තින්නවේලි) සියල්ල ටොන් 20/හෙ වාණිජ අස්වැන්නක් ඉලක්ක කරයි.
body_translated.ta: HORDI புடலங்காய் (Trichosanthes cucumerina L.) 1.5 × 1.5 m இடைவெளியில் — பெரும்பாலான கொடி குக்கர்பிட்கள் விட அதிக அகலம் — நடுகிறது, ஏனெனில் தொங்கும் பழத்திற்கு விழும் இடம் தேவை மற்றும் கொடி வேகமாக வளரும். மண் pH 5.5–7.5, நடவுக்கு முன் 10 t/ha நன்கு சிதைந்த கரிமப்பொருள் சேர்க்கவும்; விதை அளவு 4 kg/ha. அடிப்படை உரம் 75 யூரியா + 200 TSP + 60 MOP (kg/ha), பின்னர் 4 மற்றும் 8 வாரங்களில் 75 யூரியா + 60 MOP சமச்சீர் மேல் உரம் இரண்டு. நடவு செய்த 60–75 நாட்களில் அறுவடை தொடங்கி 4 நாட்கள் இடைவெளியில் தொடர்கிறது. வெளியிடப்பட்ட வகைகள் (TA-2, MI-Short, தின்னவேலி) அனைத்தும் 20 t/ha வணிக மகசூலை இலக்காகக் கொண்டுள்ளன.

quote: Spacing: 1.5 m x 1.5 m. Seed Rate: 4kg/ha. Basal: Urea 75, TSP 200, MOP 60. Top Dressing (4 weeks): Urea 75, MOP 60. Top Dressing (8 weeks): Urea 75, MOP 60. Add 10 t/ha of organic matters.
